name: Jira
description: Jira is the #1 project management tool for agile teams. Plan sprints, track bugs, manage backlogs, and ship great software faster. Integrates seamlessly with GitHub, Confluence, Slack, and 3,000+ apps.

name: ChatGPT
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered assistant that helps you write, research, brainstorm, translate, and code. Powered by GPT-4o, it adapts to your needs with real-time web search, image generation, and voice conversation features.

name: Canva: Design, Photo & Video
description: Canva is the world's most popular design platform. Create stunning social media posts, presentations, posters, logos, and videos using thousands of templates. AI-powered tools make professional design easy for everyone.

name: Duolingo: Language Lessons
description: Duolingo is the world's most popular way to learn a language. Practice Spanish, French, German, Japanese, and 40+ more languages with fun, bite-sized lessons powered by AI tutors and gamified streaks.

name: Spotify: Music & Podcasts
description: Spotify is the leading audio streaming platform with over 100 million songs and 5 million podcasts. Discover new music with personalized playlists like Discover Weekly and Daily Mix. Enjoy offline listening with Premium.

name: TikTok
description: TikTok is the world's leading short-form video platform. Create, share, and discover entertaining videos with powerful editing tools, filters, and an AI-powered For You feed.

name: Instagram
description: Instagram is a visual-first social media platform for sharing photos, reels, and stories. Connect with creators, discover brands, and grow your audience with powerful tools for content creation and marketing.

name: WhatsApp Messenger
description: WhatsApp is the world's most popular messaging app. Send texts, voice messages, make HD video calls, share media, and stay connected with end-to-end encryption for privacy.
